summary: Completed testing of legacy image display fix for X-CLEAN car wash management system. Fixed backend /api/images/{image_id} endpoint to handle both 'data' and 'data_url' field formats. All 7 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: legacy images display correctly in preview and fullscreen view.
passed_tests: Backend API - GET /api/images/{image_id} returns PNG image correctly (70 bytes)
Backend API - GET /api/images/{image_id} returns JPEG image correctly (239KB)
Backend API - GET /api/cloudinary/config returns configured status
Backend API - POST /api/files/upload returns Cloudinary URL
Backend API - GET /api/ returns API info
Backend API - POST /api/auth/login works with admin/admin123
Frontend - Dashboard loads correctly after login
Frontend - Job with legacy image shows '1' in image count
Frontend - Image dialog displays legacy image in correct slot (Kültér Előlről jobboldal)
Frontend - Legacy image URL correctly built: https://carwash-mobile-fix.preview.emergentagent.com/api/images/img_xxx
Frontend - Fullscreen view opens when clicking zoom button
Frontend - Fullscreen displays full legacy image correctly
seed_data_creation: Updated job job_04ba5f649ef4 (TEST-001) with legacy image reference: images_before.kulter_elol_jobb = '/api/images/img_009569834ccf'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 fixed and tested legacy image display. The issue was that the backend /api/images/{image_id} endpoint was looking for 'data' field but the database had 'data_url' field (full data URL format like 'data:image/png;base64,...'). Fixed misc.py to handle both formats. Legacy images now display correctly in Dashboard image dialog and fullscreen view. New uploads go to Cloudinary and return Cloudinary URLs. Test job TEST-001 has a legacy image in kulter_elol_jobb slot.

fix_applied.issue: Backend was looking for 'data' field but database had 'data_url' field
fix_applied.solution: Added logic to handle both 'data' (raw base64) and 'data_url' (data URL format) fields
